title: PvP and optimizations
description: This Modpack adds a lot of mods witch help with pvp and to get more frames, if you dont need a mod delete it
body:
🚀 PvP and Optimizations v1.2.1

Release Version: 1.2.1 (Stable)
Total Mods: 60+ Precision-Configured Mods
Performance Tested: Up to 500 FPS on high-end systems, 270+ FPS in heavy bases
RAM Requirement: Optimized for 4GB RAM

Overview

PvP and Optimizations is a Minecraft Fabric modpack designed to maximize FPS, reduce stutters, and enhance PvP performance. Every mod is carefully selected to improve combat visibility, game stability, and overall smoothness — without sacrificing visuals.

Whether you’re on a modest PC or a top-tier rig, this pack ensures your game stays fast, responsive, and competitive. Optional mods can be removed if you want a lighter setup.

__________________________________________________________________________________________________

Core Performance & FPS Boosters

Sodium & Sodium Extra: High-FPS foundation for smooth rendering

Lithium: Optimizes game logic for lower CPU usage

ImmediatelyFast: Speeds up particle and entity rendering

Krypton & VMP: Advanced network optimizations for lag-free multiplayer

FerriteCore: Reduces RAM usage

C2ME: Multi-core chunk loading for faster worlds

BadOptimizations & More Culling: Skip rendering what you can’t see

ScalableLux: Modernized lighting engine

_________________________________________________________________________________________________

PvP & Combat Utilities

Gamma Utils (Fullbright): No darkness in fights

Health Indicators: Track enemy HP in real-time

Armor HUD & Detail Armor Bar: Monitor your gear status instantly

Zoomify & WI Zoom: Tactical zoom for precision shots

Dynamic Crosshair: Better aiming accuracy

Status Effect Bars: Clean potion and debuff display

InvMove: Access inventory while moving

Visuals & Quality of Life

ETF & EMF: Improved entity textures and models

LambDynamicLights: Realistic lighting from torches

AppleSkin: Hunger and saturation info at a glance

Shulker Box Tooltip: Peek inside shulkers without placing them

Camera Tweaks: Smooth camera movement

Chat Heads: Player faces next to messages

Simple Voice Chat & Discord RPC: Multiplayer social features

Stability & Settings Management

YOSBR & YOSBS: Saves options across updates

Borderless Fullscreen: Faster Alt-Tab during matches

Language Reload: Instant language switching

Mod Menu & YACL: Easy access to all mod settings

Pro Tips for Best Performance

V-Sync: Turn OFF if your FPS is capped at 60 or 144

Max Framerate: Set to Unlimited for peak FPS

1% Lows: Even high-end PCs will benefit from stable frame rates

Optional Mods: Remove what you don’t need to save resources

________________________________________________________________________________________________

Compatibility: Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.10
Platforms: Fabric
Supported Environments: Client & Server

________________________________________________________________________________________________
